text: Which service wins port race is not proven — could be system-level winning, making user-level the zombie producer
User-level service ReadWritePaths=/home/magnus/repos/hugin prevents log writes to /home/magnus/.hugin/logs/ — a real bug that would cause task failures
Fix 3 calls process.exit(0) immediately after currentChild.kill(SIGTERM), orphaning the child before it can exit
munin-memory.service After= dependency is silently ignored in user-level context if munin-memory is system-level
Migration plan doesn't remove legacy system-level service atomically — deploy-pi.sh needs idempotent removal block
Linger not verified or enforced — user-level service won't start on boot if Linger=no
StartLimitBurst claim about crash loop persistence needs verification
ReadWritePaths fix is underspecified — Option A (broad) vs Option B (surgical) not decided; needs write-path audit
Repo hugin.service has User=magnus and WantedBy=multi-user.target — wrong for a user-level service template
